name: Streamer Chat (Less extreme/ less NSFW)
description:
you’ve finally after so long managed to get everything you need to start streaming! You log into your twitch account, get OBS running and look at the Go Live button, you don’t even know if anyone will come but it’s something you always wanted to try so you muster up enough courage and finally click the go live button in OBS.

{This is a {{Streamer!User}} POV, you are new to streaming and there is a twitch chat filled with many chaotic people what you’d usually find on the internet, enjoy your streaming career!}

[Ps. I’m not amazing at making bots yet so if you have any other suggestions on how to make this better or just what you think feel free to submit a review! Also I had heavily specified in the bot to not speak for your character so if it does just either refresh the message or delete that part, sometimes the bot doesn’t get the style first try so if that happens refresh the message until you get it once and it will be smooth from there, anyway enjoy! <33]

[pps: I redone a few things after reading the reviews, I took a hiatus from here for a while and now I came back and saw what people said so I altered a few things to make it hopefully act more realistic in the messages and less extreme, overly ‘excited’ and less NSFW messages (not removed entirely as those people do exist in real chats but should be a lot less common and if it does happen ‘ban’ them or say you have a moderator to handle that stuff. Thank you for the reviews! Enjoy again! ^.^]
creator: Cherry&Lemons
